Video.summary: Director Ti West hosts a thrilling lineup of genre-bending horror, action-packed adventures, mysteries, and more!
Video.grandparentTitle: Chills and Thrills with Ti West
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Eli Roth presents a wild ride through cult horror, shocking exploitation, and vintage sci-fi.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Take a look back at the epic adventures, timeless dramas, and groundbreaking sci-fi classics that defined Charlton Heston's career.
Video.grandparentTitle: Charlton Heston: Man of Monumental Movies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: John Landis returns to Trailers from Hell to talk 'Citizen Kane' and more classic movies.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Golden Age Gone Wild

Video.summary: Director John Landis joins Trailers from Hell to talk 'Battle for the Planet of the Apes' and more.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy

The Land of Landis: Apes, Angels, and Anarchy

Video.summary: From 'Bonnie and Clyde' to 'Duck Soup,' filmmaker John Landis talks his favorite film trailers.
Video.title: The Land of Landis: Crime, Carnage & Curiosity

The Land of Landis: Crime, Carnage & Curiosity

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante highlights Hollywood's atomic age paranoia and the nightmares unleashed on unsuspecting audiences.
Video.grandparentTitle: Joe Dante Enters the Atomic Age
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante pays tribute to the classic creature features that inspired a generation of filmmakers.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director and storyteller Mick Garris shares his personal film favorites and the stories behind them.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: TFH creator Joe Dante celebrates the noir classics that explore themes of identity, paranoia, and duality.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Humanity faces its greatest threat as the monstrous lizard Barugon is unleashed in Japan. It’s up to Gamera to find his way back to Earth and save the day.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Allan Arkush delves into the world of movie music and the concert films that have wowed audiences for decades.
Video.title: The Musical Musings of Allan Arkush

Image.alt: The Musical Musings of Allan Arkush
The Musical Musings of Allan Arkush
The Musical Musings of Allan Arkush

Video.summary: Legendary director Joe Dante discusses his favorite films.
Video.title: Joe Dante: Fearless Leaders Film Favorites

Joe Dante: Fearless Leaders Film Favorites

Video.summary: Brian Trenchard-Smith continues his deep dive into filmmaking, exploring the challenges and triumphs of bringing a vision to life on screen.
Video.title: Film Philosophies of Brian Trenchard-Smith Vol. 2

Image.alt: Film Philosophies of Brian Trenchard-Smith Vol. 2
Film Philosophies of Brian Trenchard-Smith Vol. 2
Film Philosophies of Brian Trenchard-Smith Vol. 2

Video.summary: From highbrow to lowbrow, to no brow, Allan Arkush examines the many smirking faces of cinema.
Video.title: Movies 101 with Professor Allan Arkush

Video.summary: Get rowdy with Big Trouble in Little China, Rambo, Dirty Harry, Mad Max, and more kick ass movies!
Video.title: ACTION!!! Vol. 1

Video.summary: Two American soldiers must put aside their differences in order to survive on a remote island after they are attacked by Japanese forces in World War II.
Video.title: Battle of Blood Island

Video.summary: A former Union soldier becomes a bounty hunter and vows to track down the racist thugs that murdered his mother.
Video.title: Joshua

Video.summary: A pantheon of prestige from more than 100 years of Hollywood, these are the classics we'll remember forever.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From spine-chilling thrills to edge-of-your-seat suspense, filmmaker Katt Shea talks her favorite films.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Director Ernest Dickerson talks epic filmmaking and the eternal struggles of cinema's greatest characters.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Return to the outlaw days of the Old West with classics starring Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and more.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jane Russell sizzles on screen as Rio McDonald, a woman caught in the paths of Wild West legends Billy the Kid, Doc Holliday, and Pat Garrett. This 1943 blockbuster, directed by Howard Hughes, was famously controversial for its depiction of Russell, who became a sex symbol after its release.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Saddle up as your favorite filmmakers talk beloved big screen Westerns!
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From gunslingers to rebel heroes, Clint Eastwood brings grit, charm, and intensity in a way that no other movie star can.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From satirical comedies to intense dramas, these war movies capture the chaos, tragedy, and complexity of conflict.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Hollywood's greatest heroes fight history's greatest battles in this classic war film collection.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 2: The Fight for Freedom
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Revisit an epic collection of war films that capture the bravery, sacrifice, and cost of conflict.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 3: Triumph and Turmoil
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: These gripping war films explore the chaos, complexity, and moral ambiguity of conflict on the big screen.
Video.grandparentTitle: This Means War Vol. 4: The Fog of War
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From Bullitt to Bad Lieutenant, filmmakers discuss cops that kick ass on the big screen.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: From the past to the future, laying down the law comes easy to these big screen cops!
Video.title: Episode 1
